FO-Ia-1.performance_standard: Perform operations accurately and solve business-related problems
FO-Ia-1.learning_competency: Perform fundamental operations on fractions and decimals.

FO-Ia-2.performance_standard: Convert between fraction, decimal, and percent forms
FO-Ia-2.learning_competency: Express fractions to decimals and percent forms and vice versa.

RP-Ie-1.performance_standard: Compare and differentiate ratio and rate
RP-Ie-1.learning_competency: Compare and differentiate ratio and rate.

RP-If-4.performance_standard: Solve problems involving direct, inverse, and partitive proportion
RP-If-4.learning_competency: Solve problems involving direct, inverse and partitive proportion.

BS-Ig-1.performance_standard: Analyze and solve problems on mark-up, mark-down, and mark-on

BS-Ij-8.performance_standard: Illustrate how to determine break-even point
BS-Ij-8.learning_competency: Define break-even; illustrate how to determine break-even point.

SW-IId-2.performance_standard: Compute gross and net earnings including deductions

PAD-IIh-5.content_standard: Measures of central tendency and variability
PAD-IIh-5.performance_standard: Analyze and interpret business data using statistical tools
PAD-IIh-5.learning_competency: Analyze and interpret data using measures of central tendency.

PAD-IIj-11.performance_standard: Use software to compute and present graphical representations
PAD-IIj-11.learning_competency: Use software (MS Excel, etc.) to compute and present graphical business data.
